pages.title: /risa-labs-closes-11-1m-series-a-to-scale-ai-operating-system-for-oncology-nationwide
pages.note: Claims of 80% staff time freed and 97.8% first-pass approval lack independent verification, patient identifiers, or third-party validation; specific deployment counts and customer names are absent despite assertions of being 'already live at some of the largest oncology practices.'

pages.title: /prior-auth
pages.note: Page lacks named customer deployments, clinical outcomes data, or peer-reviewed validation; relies on product screenshots and feature claims without independent evidence or cited results.

No named customer deployments, concrete clinical outcomes, or verifiable healthcare partnerships mentioned; funding announcement and feature descriptions lack specifics on real-world adoption or measurable results.
No named customers, deployment outcomes, or case studies provided—only $11.1M Series A funding and feature descriptions without concrete evidence of clinical impact or user validation.
